reasoning_chain_text: 1. Identify the megalopolis that includes Manchester, New Hampshire near its northern end.
2. Determine the other major cities included in that megalopolis and return the list.
original_final_question: Manchester, New Hampshire is a part of the Northeast megalopolis which included what other major cities? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: Which megalopolis is Manchester, New Hampshire near the northern end of? Evidence: Manchester, New Hampshire: Manchester is near the northern end of the Northeast megalopolis. -> Northeast megalopolis

Node 2: Which major cities are included in the Northeast megalopolis? Evidence: Northeast megalopolis: It includes the major cities of Boston, Providence, Hartford, New York City, Philadelphia, Wilmington, Baltimore, and Washington, D.C., along with their metropolitan areas and suburbs as well as many smaller urban centers. -> Boston, Providence, Hartford, New York City, Philadelphia, Wilmington, Baltimore, and Washington, D.C.
Final answer: Boston, Providence, Hartford, New York City, Philadelphia, Wilmington, Baltimore, and Washington, D.C.
